subline: All required safety devices integrated as standard, per EN 1808.

items.imageAlt: Built-in overload mechanism on the UNILIFT hoist
items.title: Built-in Overload Mechanism
items.descriptionHtml: When the load reaches or exceeds the limit, the hoist stops rising and will only descend. Trips at 125% WLL.

items.imageAlt: Manual safety lowering mechanism on the UNILIFT hoist
items.title: Safety Lowering Mechanism
items.descriptionHtml: In a power failure, the electro-mechanical brake can be released manually for a safe, controlled descent.

items.imageAlt: Hour counter in the UNILIFT connection box
items.title: Hour Counter
items.descriptionHtml: An internal running-hours counter in the connection box records operating time, so service intervals are always known.

items.imageAlt: UNILIFT attachment points and suspension options
items.title: Attachment Points
items.descriptionHtml: Suspend from a central load pin, or fix at the housing corners with a hook, screw or pins. Adaptable to any rig.
